summary: poe.com redirected to /login?redirect_url=%2F (Google/Apple SSO + email login wall). Cannot submit PII prompt without authentication. Hard reload returned the original poe SPA login HTML (transferSize=17044, decodedBodySize=76555, title='Poe - 빠르고 유용한 AI 채팅') — V6-F did NOT intercept. No engine block fires because no PII request was made. No warning bubble rendered. defer:user_login_provisioning required to test V6-F generalization on poe.

auth_state.skip_reason: Login required; per safety policy SSO/account-creation requires explicit user authorization not granted in this dispatch

network_observations.x_apf_page_inject_header_note: Header not visible in DevTools Headers panel for the login document; no injection signature observed (size + title + DOM all confirm original poe content was returned)

dom_scan.title: Poe - 빠르고 유용한 AI 채팅
h_tags_sampled: 최고의 AI와 개인 또는 그룹 채팅을 해보세요. Poe에서 GPT-5.4, Claude-Opus-4.6, Gemini-3.1-Pro, Nano-Banana-Pro, Veo-3.1 및 수천 개의 AI를 만나보세요.
dom_scan.body_snippet: 최고의 AI와 개인 또는 그룹 채팅을 해보세요. Poe에서 GPT-5.4, Claude-Opus-4.6, Gemini-3.1-Pro, Nano-Banana-Pro, Veo-3.1 및 수천 개의 AI를 만나보세요. Google 계정으로 계속하기 또는 이동 휴대폰 사용 정보 블로그 리더보드 Poe 시작하기

console_observations.csp_violations: many (twitter, facebook, google, cookielaw blocked by poe CSP — unrelated to APF)
console_observations.fetch_attempt_to_check_x_apf_header: blocked by poe CSP (connect-src) — promise stays pending; navigation entry used as substitute evidence

comparison_to_722_notion_v6f.interpretation: V6-F path_patterns='/' did NOT trigger for poe.com login. Either (a) poe is not yet registered for h2_mode=2 V6-F intercept on the gateway, or (b) the request never reached the chat-message endpoint that V6-F is configured to intercept (login HTML page bypasses APF inspection). Cannot disambiguate without authenticated session reaching the chat endpoint.

files.after_submit_note: Same as before.png — PII prompt could not be submitted (auth wall blocks chat input)
files.after_reload_note: Captured after Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload — page remains login wall, V6-F did not intercept

next_action: defer:user_login_provisioning — request user to log into poe.com (Google SSO with plantynetaitest@gmail.com) on test PC, then re-dispatch #723 to actually submit PII prompt and verify V6-F on the chat endpoint.
